rationale: Builds directly on the current best soft projection ramp instead of changing the quantizer again. The main change is to make the last quant-aware roundtrip exact whenever that step is also the terminal training step under the wallclock/iteration budget, because there is no later optimizer step that could benefit from staying off the final int8 manifold. Earlier quant-aware snaps stay soft, but now scale their blend by each tensor's current roundtrip error so low-error tensors are disturbed less while high-error tensors are pulled harder toward the exact final artifact. This keeps the strong row-offset int8 path, stays under the 1500-line cap, and targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb more directly than another global schedule replay.
title: Terminal Exact Snap With Error-Adaptive Soft Mix
